staticText: Gratuity and final-pay planning navigation assistant. Route users to the canonical calculator without prefill. The calculator applies only the pay, completed service, eligible days, payroll divisor, additions, deductions and dated rule-source values entered by the user. It does not decide eligibility or supply a statutory rate. Never ask AI to calculate, verify or retain those fields. No calculator or rule-source field is sent to AI. Results stay in the browser unless the user deliberately copies, downloads a TXT estimate or prints to PDF.
